cloze_textbook_examples.en: source_lang={source_lang} target_lang={target_lang} document_title={document_title} source_url={source_url} difficulty={difficulty} cloze_max_sentences={cloze_max_sentences} cloze_min_chars={cloze_min_chars} cloze_max_per_chunk={cloze_max_per_chunk} You will be given one or more chunks. Each chunk looks like: chunk_id=chunk_0001_xxxxxx chunk_text= The input is often textbook-style and may contain: - a headword/phrase line (e.g., "Grab a bite") - dictionary-like definition/explanation lines - one or more natural example sentences Selection policy (very important): 1) Create candidates ONLY from natural example sentences learners would actually speak/write. 2) Do NOT create candidates from standalone headword/title lines. 3) Do NOT create candidates from dictionary-style definition lines. 4) If a chunk has no good example sentence, return no item for that chunk. Generate Anki Cloze candidates across all chunks. Your output MUST be a JSON array. Each item MUST have this shape: {{ "chunk_id": "the corresponding chunk_id", "text": "cloze text (<= {cloze_max_sentences} sentences; >= {cloze_min_chars} chars)", "original": "plain text without cloze markers or HTML", "target_phrases": ["phrase 1", "phrase 2"], "note_hint": "optional short hint" }} Requirements: 1) `text` must include at least one cloze deletion, close to: {{cN::PHRASE}}(hint in target language). 2) Cloze indices must increase by appearance order (c1, c2, c3...). Do not repeat multiple c1 in the same `text`. 3) `original` must NOT contain any cloze markers or HTML. 4) You may use ... for emphasis. Do NOT use Markdown **. 5) Omit any candidate whose `text` is shorter than {cloze_min_chars} characters or whose sentence count exceeds {cloze_max_sentences}. 6) Difficulty policy: - beginner: prefer concrete, common collocations; usually 1 cloze per candidate. - intermediate: prefer idiomatic collocations; usually 1-2 clozes per candidate. - advanced: prefer advanced collocations / abstract wording / semantic turns; usually 2-3 clozes per candidate; avoid overly basic expressions. 7) For difficulty=advanced, avoid low-value targets such as "think if", "this data or that data", or a single very common verb. 8) For each chunk, try to produce 0-{cloze_max_per_chunk} high-quality candidates. 9) If nothing is suitable, return an empty array. Example of acceptable source sentence style: We're in a hurry to get there, so we'll just grab a bite at a fast-food place. chunk_text: {chunk_text}
cloze_textbook_examples.zh: source_lang={source_lang} target_lang={target_lang} document_title={document_title} source_url={source_url} difficulty={difficulty} cloze_max_sentences={cloze_max_sentences} cloze_min_chars={cloze_min_chars} cloze_max_per_chunk={cloze_max_per_chunk} 你将收到一个或多个 chunk。每个 chunk 的格式如下： chunk_id=chunk_0001_xxxxxx chunk_text= <该 chunk 的完整文本> 输入通常是教材风格，可能包含： - 词条/短语标题行（例如 "Grab a bite"） - 类词典的释义/解释行 - 一个或多个自然例句 筛选策略（非常重要）： 1) 只从学习者真实会说/会写的自然例句中生成候选。 2) 不要从孤立的词条标题行生成候选。 3) 不要从词典式释义行生成候选。 4) 如果某个 chunk 没有优质例句，则该 chunk 不返回候选。 请基于所有 chunk 生成 Anki Cloze 候选。 输出必须是 JSON 数组。每个元素必须符合以下结构： {{ "chunk_id": "对应的 chunk_id", "text": "cloze 文本（<= {cloze_max_sentences} 句；>= {cloze_min_chars} 字符）", "original": "不含 cloze 标记与 HTML 的纯文本", "target_phrases": ["短语1", "短语2"], "note_hint": "可选的简短提示" }} 要求： 1) `text` 至少包含一个 cloze，格式接近：{{cN::PHRASE}}(目标语言提示)。 2) Cloze 序号按出现顺序递增（c1, c2, c3...）；同一 `text` 内不要重复多个 c1。 3) `original` 不得包含任何 cloze 标记或 HTML。 4) 可以使用 ... 强调；不要使用 Markdown **。 5) 若某候选 `text` 长度小于 {cloze_min_chars} 或句子数超过 {cloze_max_sentences}，则省略该候选。 6) 难度策略： - beginner：优先具体、常见搭配；通常每条 1 个 cloze。 - intermediate：优先地道搭配；通常每条 1-2 个 cloze。 - advanced：优先高级搭配/抽象表达/语义转折；通常每条 2-3 个 cloze；避免过于基础表达。 7) 当 difficulty=advanced 时，避免低价值目标，如 "think if"、"this data or that data"，或单个过于常见的动词。 8) 每个 chunk 尽量生成 0-{cloze_max_per_chunk} 条高质量候选。 9) 若没有合适内容，返回空数组。 可接受的源句风格示例： We're in a hurry to get there, so we'll just grab a bite at a fast-food place. chunk_text: {chunk_text}
